name: mcapp-ai-starter Dev Container
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p /home/vscode/.config/vscode-dev-containers && touch /home/vscode/.config/vscode-dev-containers/first-run-notice-already-displayed || true && mkdir -p .devcontainer/.cache/npm && python -m pip install --upgrade "dspy[mcp]" && corepack enable && if [ -f package.json ]; then npm ci || true; fi
